The [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] '''N-1T Advanced Starfighter''' was the successor of the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]].

==Characteristics==
The N-1T Advanced [[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighter]] was a vessel used by the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]]. It featured superior firepower with its [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and durability than the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]]. The craft featured two [[Engine/Legends|engine]] units and was flown by one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. The starfighter featured [[Chromium/Legends|chromium]] plating in the bow and was [[Color/Legends|colored]] yellow in the aft section. The starfighters were produced at [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] airbases.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:N1Concept-ST.jpg|thumb|left|N-1 concept art]]
The N-1T is similar to earlier concept art of a less streamlined iteration of the N-1 starfighter. It first appeared in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2003]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]] as the Naboo civilization's advanced fighter unit. It was constructable in skirmish only.
